name: ExtensionMeasureReport_Group_Stratifier_Stratum_MeasureScore
title: R5: measureScore additional types
description: R5: `MeasureReport.group.stratifier.stratum.measureScore[x]` additional types (dateTime, CodeableConcept, Period, Range)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MeasureReport.group.stratifier.stratum.measureScore[x]` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MeasureReport.group.stratifier.stratum.measureScore[x]` 0..1 `CodeableConcept, dateTime, Duration, Period, Quantity, Range`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MeasureReport.group.stratifier.stratum.measureScore[x]` 0..1 `CodeableConcept, dateTime, Duration, Period, Quantity, Range`
*  R4B: `MeasureReport.group.stratifier.stratum.measureScore` 0..1 `Quantity`
*  R4: `MeasureReport.group.stratifier.stratum.measureScore` 0..1 `Quantity`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MeasureReport.group.stratifier.stratum.measureScore[x]` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `MeasureReport.group.stratifier.stratum.measureScore` as `RelatedTo`.
The mappings for `MeasureReport.group.stratifier.stratum.measureScore[x]` do not cover the following types: CodeableConcept, dateTime, Period, Range.

element.definition: The measure score for this stratum, calculated as appropriate for the measure type and scoring method, and based on only the members of this stratum.
